summary: First-round full-stack testing of the AI Invoice Review System. 21/21 backend pytest cases passed (health, auth, signup/login/me/duplicate, /process with APPROVED/HUMAN_REVIEW/REJECTED paths, list/filter/search, detail, edit, approve, reject, audit trail, /stats, and 401 protection). All 8 critical frontend flows passed via Playwright (login, dashboard stats, upload+extraction, queue rows/search/status filter, invoice detail edit & save, reject transition, audit timeline append). No blocking issues found.

minor.issue: Cookie auth (httpOnly access_token) is accepted even when Authorization header is absent — this is by design per playbook, but tests must use a cookie-free client to exercise the 401 path.

When CORS_ORIGINS='*' (current setting) allow_credentials is forced to False, but the login response still sets a httpOnly cookie with SameSite=None;Secure. The cookie won't be readable cross-origin under the wildcard policy — currently fine because the frontend uses Bearer + localStorage, but recommend setting CORS_ORIGINS explicitly to FRONTEND_URL for production.

action_items: (Optional) Replace CORS allow_origins='*' with explicit FRONTEND_URL so credentials/cookies flow cleanly across environments.
(Optional) Consider deleting raw_text from /api/invoices listing payloads early — already done via projection, good.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS wildcard + cookie SameSite=None;Secure cannot co-exist with credentialed XHR; OK only because frontend uses Bearer + localStorage. Tighten in prod.
auth_routes.seed_default_users: idempotent and updates password_hash if env password changed — good.

invoice_routes.process_invoice: builds Invoice() then mutates before insert — works, but final insert relies on model_dump() including default fields; consider re-validating via Invoice.model_validate to guarantee schema integrity.
rules_engine.evaluate: duplicate rule short-circuits and skips other failed rules in the returned reason — acceptable per spec (duplicate => REJECTED takes priority).
models.Invoice raw_text is Optional[str]: excluded from /api/invoices list projection — good for payload size.
All MongoDB reads correctly project out _id (`{'_id': 0}`) — no ObjectId serialization risk.
test_credentials: admin@invoiceai.com / Admin@123 (ADMIN); reviewer@invoiceai.com / Reviewer@123 (REVIEWER). Seeded at startup, validated.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TXT invoices with unique INV-OK{suffix}, INV-HIGH{suffix}, INV-MISS{suffix}, INV-UI-TEST-A invoice numbers. Cleanup not required (DB is preview env).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints and major UI flows are working as of this iteration. Re-use /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression — it uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env and unique suffixes per run, so it is safely re-runnable. The frontend file input has class 'hidden' on /upload; in Playwright use wait_for_selector(..., state='attached') and set_input_files directly. Cookie auth + Bearer both supported by backend — for unauth tests use a fresh requests.get (no Session).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs detected this round.
